question: Renal tubular acidosis can be caused by the:
choices: production of excessively acidic urine due to increased filtration of hydrogen ions
production of excessively acidic urine due to increased secretion of hydrogen ions
inability to produce an acidic urine due to impaired production of ammonia
inability to produce an acidic urine due to increased production of ammonia
answer: inability to produce an acidic urine due to impaired production of ammonia
